title: Mechanical Design & CAD
summary: Concept development, 3D modelling, and detailed engineering drawings. Compliance with BS, ISO, and ASME standards.

title: Structural & Thermal Analysis
summary: FEA, CFD, and hand calculations for stress, fatigue, heat transfer, and fluid flow. Optimisation for performance and safety.

title: Project Engineering & Management
summary: From feasibility to commissioning. Risk assessment, procurement support, site supervision, and technical documentation.

title: Reliability & Maintenance
summary: RCM, FMEA, condition monitoring, and lifecycle cost analysis. Improve uptime and reduce unplanned downtime.

title: Sustainable Energy Systems
summary: Renewable integration, energy audits, heat pump systems, and carbon reduction strategies. CHP & HVAC optimisation.

title: Expert Witness & Due Diligence
summary: Technical audits, failure investigation, and litigation support. Independent assessment for insurance, legal, and regulatory bodies.
